title: Exit Unit Settings
description: Display settings for the MyScan Exit Unit application.

logoUrl.title: Logo URL
logoUrl.description: HTTPS URL for the logo image displayed above the QR code.

backgroundUrl.title: Background URL
backgroundUrl.description: HTTPS URL for the full-screen background image.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Material Design 3 color roles for theming the Exit Unit UI.

primary.title: Primary
primary.description: Primary brand color, used for key UI elements such as buttons and active indicators.

onPrimary.title: On Primary
onPrimary.description: Color for text and icons displayed on top of the primary color.

primaryContainer.title: Primary Container
primaryContainer.description: Tonal variant of primary, used for less prominent containers.

onPrimaryContainer.title: On Primary Container
onPrimaryContainer.description: Color for text and icons on top of the primary container color.

secondary.title: Secondary
secondary.description: Secondary accent color for less prominent UI elements.

onSecondary.title: On Secondary
onSecondary.description: Color for text and icons displayed on top of the secondary color.

secondaryContainer.title: Secondary Container
secondaryContainer.description: Tonal variant of secondary, used for less prominent containers.

onSecondaryContainer.title: On Secondary Container
onSecondaryContainer.description: Color for text and icons on top of the secondary container color.

tertiary.title: Tertiary
tertiary.description: Tertiary accent color for contrasting elements.

onTertiary.title: On Tertiary
onTertiary.description: Color for text and icons displayed on top of the tertiary color.

tertiaryContainer.title: Tertiary Container
tertiaryContainer.description: Tonal variant of tertiary, used for less prominent containers.

onTertiaryContainer.title: On Tertiary Container
onTertiaryContainer.description: Color for text and icons on top of the tertiary container color.

onError.title: On Error
onError.description: Color for text and icons displayed on top of the error color.

errorContainer.title: Error Container
errorContainer.description: Tonal variant of error, used for less prominent error containers.

onErrorContainer.title: On Error Container
onErrorContainer.description: Color for text and icons on top of the error container color.

onWarning.title: On Warning
onWarning.description: Color for text and icons displayed on top of the warning color.

warningContainer.title: Warning Container
warningContainer.description: Tonal variant of warning, used for less prominent warning containers.

onWarningContainer.title: On Warning Container
onWarningContainer.description: Color for text and icons on top of the warning container color.

onSuccess.title: On Success
onSuccess.description: Color for text and icons displayed on top of the success color.

successContainer.title: Success Container
successContainer.description: Tonal variant of success, used for less prominent success containers.

onSuccessContainer.title: On Success Container
onSuccessContainer.description: Color for text and icons on top of the success container color.

onBackground.title: On Background
onBackground.description: Color for text and icons displayed on the background.

surface.title: Surface
surface.description: Surface color for cards and containers.

onSurface.title: On Surface
onSurface.description: Color for text and icons displayed on surfaces.

surfaceVariant.title: Surface Variant
surfaceVariant.description: Alternative surface color for visual differentiation.

onSurfaceVariant.title: On Surface Variant
onSurfaceVariant.description: Color for text and icons on surface variant backgrounds.

outlineVariant.title: Outline Variant
outlineVariant.description: Subtler outline color for decorative borders.

ImageUrl.description: HTTPS URL ending with a supported image format (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, BMP, SVG).
